3.translation: and that which is strangled (to death)
and that which is hit fatally
and that which has a fatal fall
and that which is gored by horns

4.translation: ones who train animals to hunt

12.translation: and I will surely admit you

65.translation: and surely We (would have) admitted them

89.translation: He will call you to account

113.translation: you have spoken the truth to us
